creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Reference: pointyhat build logs at
	http://pointyhat.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/a.8.20120716111253/gutenprint-foomatic-5.2.8.log
	http://pointyhat.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.9.20120717204819/gutenprint-foomatic-5.2.8.log
	http://pointyhat.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.9.20120717204819/gutenprint-cups-5.2.8.log

	The pkg-plist of gutenprint-cups and gutenprint-foomatic is incorrect
	(the former has too many files, the latter is missing some files).
	Attached patch fixes this and adds LICENSE lines (for silencing portlint's
	FATAL messages).

Fix: Patch also available at http://www.burggraben.net/tmp/gutenprint_fixpkgplist.diff

	
How-To-Repeat: 	see pointyhat logs
